title: Employee Wellness Software | CoreHealth

headers.text: Inspiring Holistic Health Engagement & Outcomes Through Technology
See What Our Clients Are Saying
Don't Just Take Our Word for It

paragraphs: CoreHealth Checkpoint:delivers key insights into employee and organizational well-being
CoreHealth NOW:an all-in-one wellness program that’s ready when you are
CoreHealth Pro:Customizable wellness platform for managing employee well-being programs
Use our suite of digital solutions designed to support the health journeys of your employees, members, or clients.

For over 20 years, CoreHealth has been a trusted wellness technology partner for organizations and wellness providers worldwide. Our difference is simple: deep experience and unmatched flexibility, giving you the tools and confidence to build company wellness programs that truly work.
Withthree powerful solutions, we make it easy to meet your wellness goals, whether you need actionable health insights, a fast-track platform, or a fully customized solution.
Foster a culture of care – more than a perk, it’s your competitive edge.
Drive adoption and delight with an interface designed to keep employees active.
Make smarter decisions faster with built-in analytics that turn data into actionable outcomes.
READY-TO-LAUNCH WELLNESS PROGRAM

Company wellness programs made easy. WithCoreHealth NOW, you can launch a pre-configured platform in less than a week, complete with assessments, educational resources, and engaging activity challenges. Employees track their own progress, while you get the data insights to better inform your wellness strategy and keep your healthcare costs down.
HEALTH RISK ASSESSMENTS

Uncover the insights to execute your program with precision. Our science-basedhealth risk assessmentsprovide a complete view of employee well-being, encompassing physical, mental, psychosocial, and financial health. Built for a global workforce in 26 languages, with enterprise-grade security and benchmarking across more than 1 million records, Checkpoint empowers you to maximize results.
WHITE LABELED PLATFORM

Flexibility at its best.CoreHealth PROlets you build a program your way, using your own content, our partners’ resources, or a blend of both. Deliver customized experiences for your workforce or clients without costly development. With intuitive admin tools and robust reporting, you’ll have everything you need to scale impactful wellness programs.
Meet with an expert team member to determine the best solution tailored to your needs and budget.
Collaborate with our team while we design the best program for you with the right tools, content, and engagement strategies.
Partner with our experts for guidance through implementation, training, and data-backed guidance on continuous improvement.
“This product strikes the perfect balance between customizability and ready-to-use features. The support team that comes with the product is also top-notch.”
“We don’t look for vendors; we look for partners. CoreHealth has been a key partner in helping us educate, engage, and excite our members in the wellness space.”

“We’ve used CoreHealth Now with several corporate wellness clients. The platform is engaging, user-friendly, and our clients value the turnkey solution and quick implementation. The challenges and materials are robust, support healthy habits, and integrate easily into broader wellness strategies with incentives as needed. The CoreHealth team is also great to work with on recommendations or minor troubleshooting. We look forward to seeing year-over-year results as participants take action toward healthier lifestyles.”
“We love working with CoreHealth. They function as a true partner with great people on their team.”

“CoreHealth has enabled us to grow our business as a wellness vendor by helping us provide a quality user platform at an affordable price. The relationships manager, and the entire customer support team are easy to work with, endlessly helpful, and just wonderful people all around. This small team puts out a big product that’s worth every penny.”

“The product is very flexible and can be configured to serve a multitude of needs and interests, allowing us to deliver inclusive wellness programming for multi-national companies. It is easy to create new programs, modify existing offerings, and deliver an exceptional user experience.”

CoreHealth is an employee wellness platform that helps organizations of all sizes support mental, physical, and financial well-being. It’s designed for employers and wellness providers looking to create healthy, engaged, and resilient teams.

CoreHealth makes it easy to deliver personalized wellness journeys withchallenges,incentives, content, and coaching tools. Employees stay motivated, participation grows, and HR teams save time creating a healthier, more productive workforce.
Yes. CoreHealth supports mental health and resilience, fitness tracking integrations and health coaching so employees get the right support when they need it.
Absolutely. CoreHealth scales to meet the needs of small teams and global enterprises alike, offering flexible programs, fast deployment, and enterprise-grade security.
Yes. Our dashboards track engagement, health trends, and program outcomes giving HR and leadership the insights they need to measure success and demonstrate ROI.
Yes, our employee wellness platform is available via mobile app on CoreHealth’s MyWellApp so employees can participate from anywhere they choose.

Absolutely! Our wellness software integrates with a variety of third-party health partners – supporting everything from mental and financial wellness content to fitness tracking, incentive fulfillment, analytics tools and more to provide a seamless wellness experience. See ourpartner pagefor more information.

We adhere to ISO 27001-aligned practices and comply with all applicable privacy laws. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with role-based access controls and audited processes to protect sensitive information.
Talk with our team of wellness technology experts and let us help you find the right solution for your organization’s needs.
Employee Engagement Tools
